central_repository: Nevada State Library, Archives and Public Records, Carson City
migration_note: Generated v3.1 on 2026-03-11. Nevada — 16 counties + Carson City (independent city) = 17 jurisdictions. Battle Born state (1864). All 17 jurisdiction research tips written with location-specific content. Statewide file includes 11 categories including native_american_and_removal_records and immigration_and_naturalization.

batches.description: State-level repositories, resources, and research guides for Nevada
